hooks.command: node -e "const i=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const c=i.command||''; const d=['rm -rf','git push --force','git push -f','DROP TABLE','DROP DATABASE']; const b=d.filter(x=>c.includes(x)); if(b.length){console.error('BLOCK: Dangerous command: '+b.join(', '));process.exit(1);}" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "import sys,json; i=json.load(sys.stdin); c=i.get('command',''); d=['rm -rf','git push --force','git push -f','DROP TABLE','DROP DATABASE']; b=[x for x in d if x in c]; print('BLOCK: '+str(b),file=sys.stderr) if b else None; exit(1) if b else exit(0)" 2>/dev/null || true

powershell.exe -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude has paused and is waiting for input.','Claude Code',[System.Windows.Forms.MessageBoxButtons]::OK,[System.Windows.Forms.MessageBoxIcon]::Information)" 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has paused and is waiting for input." with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null; notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude has paused and is waiting for input.' 2>/dev/null; true
